name: randhpaulmd@gmail.com
subject: That’s unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Fellow Conservative,

I'm not taking "no" for an answer.

Next week, I'm going to pull out all the stops to force a vote on my amendment to defund Planned Parenthood.

Americans were sickened by the release of video footage where Planned Parenthood's chief abortionist explains how they harvest aborted babies' organs and sell them for profit.

It made my stomach turn, but I'm more determined than ever to lead the fight in Congress to end this madness.

**[Will you stand with me in the fight to defund Planned Parenthood](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171485:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)**?

Fellow Conservative, this won't be easy.

The pro-abortion media are working overtime to sweep this scandal under the rug.

I believe my colleagues should be forced to stand in front of the American people and declare where they stand.

The truth is, Hillary Clinton and her Democrat allies are the true abortion extremists.

But a media cocoon protects them from ever being called out for their radical support for killing seven-pound babies in the womb.

I think it's time they answer for President Obama declaring "God bless Planned Parenthood."

I think it's time they answer for Planned Parenthood aborting babies and selling them for spare parts.

I think it's time we defunded Planned Parenthood once-and-for-all.

But I need your help to make this happen.

I know the liberal media will hurl every name in the book at me.

It's the same play they run every time conservatives stand up to Planned Parenthood.

I'll absorb the attacks, because not one penny of your money should fund disrespect for human life.

But to mobilize Americans to push Congress to act, I need to count on your support.

I will use every legislative tool at my disposal, but there is no more powerful motivational force in politics than angry voters.

**[So please sign your"Defund Planned Parenthood" petition right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171485:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)**.

And after you sign your petition, please chip in a contribution of $20.16 right away to help me get this petition in front of as many Americans as possible.

| | [Chip in $10 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171486:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)
---
[Chip in $25 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171487:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)
[Chip in $50 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171488:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)
[Chip in $100 immediately >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171489:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171485:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)

In Liberty,

Rand Paul

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171485:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171490:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171491:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r) [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29171492:27991524418:m:1:879035888:CFF7A1C278D57F8EAB4FB9F9F2C02BC6:r)
Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: This really matters to me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
167 years ago today: | Friend --

When Elizabeth Cady Stanton, Lucretia Mott, Frederick Douglass, and 97 other brave women and men signed their names to the Declaration of Sentiments in Seneca Falls 167 years ago today, they sparked a movement that altered the course of history.

"We hold these truths to be self-evident," they wrote, "that all men and women are created equal." All men _and women_ \-- incredible how just two words could change millions of lives.

We cannot forget the heroes who went to jail and even died to give women the right to vote, earn and keep wages, own property, serve in the military, and hold elected office. We owe it to our daughters and granddaughters to continue the march of progress in America and around the world.

**[I've been fighting for these ideals for my entire career -- and I want to take that fight all the way to the White House. Will you stand with me?](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMwODIxOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxODYwODkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

We must keep fighting for equal pay, especially for women of color, who often lose out the most. We must fight for equal access to good jobs, good health care, and good child care, for the rights of women to make our own reproductive health decisions, and to make sure that every little girl in America can be anything she wants when she grows up -- even President of the United States.

The full participation of women and girls in our society is more than an issue of fairness; it's also a smart way to grow our economy. When women aren't paid fairly, families lose out on thousands of dollars every year that could go toward paying for groceries or rent, saving for retirement, or sending a child to college. When we fight for equality, we fight for a better future for all of our children.

**Sign your name to declare your support for equality and pledge to redouble our efforts to finish the work that began in Seneca Falls:

[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/declaration-of-equality/](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=17&ms=MjMwODIxOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxODYwODkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)**

Thank you,

Hillary

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. This is your campaign, so if you have thoughts on anything at all, just [click here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=MjMwODIxOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxODYwODkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to send us a message! Getting emails from Hillary for America is one of the best ways to stay in touch with this campaign, but if you really want to scale back, click [here](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjMwODIxOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxODYwODkyS0&mt=1&rt=0) to unsubscribe. There are other ways to stay involved -- be sure to follow the campaign on [Facebook](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MjMwODIxOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxODYwODkyS0&mt=1&rt=0), [Twitter](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjMwODIxOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxODYwODkyS0&mt=1&rt=0), and [Instagram](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=MjMwODIxOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxODYwODkyS0&mt=1&rt=0). Thanks so much for doing everything you can to elect Hillary Clinton as our next president.
Hillary for America, P.O. Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=9&ms=MjMwODIxOTgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NjAxODYwODkyS0&mt=1&rt=0)

name: New Day For America
subject: Thank you for supporting New Day for America.
body:
Thank you for supporting New Day for America.

If you haven’t already, please consider sharing our ad with your friends and family so they can learn more about how John Kasich is for Us.

Sincerely,

New Day for America Team
